data.title: Visual Storytelling
data.description: Instagram is centered around showcasing visual content, allowing users to share images and videos.
data.technical_spec: Image and video sharing functionality with advanced editing tools.

data.title: Community Building
data.description: Fosters engagements and relationships through a community-driven platform.
data.technical_spec: Hashtags, comments, likes, and follow systems.

data.title: Influencer Culture
data.description: Empowers users to establish and grow their personal brand or business through influencer partnerships.
data.technical_spec: Business profiles and analytics tools for marketing.

data.title: Instant Connectivity
data.description: Facilitates real-time interaction through direct messaging and broadcasting options.
data.technical_spec: Video calling, live streaming, and DMs.

data.title: Seamless Integration
data.description: Provides smooth integration with other social media platforms and online services.
data.technical_spec: API connectivity for cross-platform posting and sharing.
